root_cause: 200GB overlay root filesystem cannot accommodate 470GB Qwen3-235B-A22B model download; insufficient space for HF hub blob cache
key_error: OSError: I/O error: IO Error: No space left on device (os error 28) | RuntimeError: Internal error: Internal Writer Error: Background writer channel closed | Warning: Not enough free disk space to download the file (expected ~4GB, only 0-2GB available)
suggested_fix: This model requires ~470GB but the 200GB root overlay has no path with sufficient capacity. Retry would fail identically. Solutions: (1) Provision >500GB persistent volume mounted at /root/.cache/huggingface, (2) Pre-download model on host with access to 28TB RAID array and bind-mount into container, (3) Use a smaller model variant (Qwen/Qwen3-7B or Qwen/Qwen3-32B) that fits in available space.
